description: Fix the field name mismatch between frontend and backend to ensure blog posts display correctly. The backend uses 'content' field while frontend expects 'body' field.

tasks.task: Fix the Post interface and data in src/blog/blog.service.ts to use 'body' field instead of 'content' field to match what the frontend expects. The Post interface on line 3-8 defines 'content: string' but should use 'body: string'. Also update the sample posts data (lines 12-31) to use 'body' instead of 'content'. This ensures the /posts endpoint returns data in the format the frontend expects: { id: number, title: string, body: string }

Verify the blog functionality works correctly after backend fix. Using Playwright MCP tools: 1) Navigate to http://localhost:5173 2) Take a snapshot to verify the PostList component renders with blog post titles and body previews 3) Click on a post title to navigate to PostDetail view 4) Verify the full post body is displayed 5) Click 'Back to posts' link to return to list. The key files are src/components/PostList.tsx (fetches from http://localhost:3000/posts and displays post.body) and src/components/PostDetail.tsx (displays full post.body)

example_backend: Verify GET /posts returns array of posts with id, title, body fields
Verify GET /posts/:id returns single post with correct structure
example_frontend: Verify blog post list loads and displays titles
Verify post body previews show first 100 characters with ellipsis
Verify clicking a post title shows the full post detail
Verify back button returns to post list
Verify error state displays when backend is unavailable
